title: From afar, American students in France feel the shockwaves of Trump

title: Danish PM Mette Frederiksen's Social Democrats lead election but fall short of majority
subhed: With all votes counted, the left-wing bloc was credited with 84 seats in the 179-seat parliament and the right with 77.
